title: tabernaemontana wallichiana
intro: Tabernaemontana wallichiana, also known as the Himalayan Devil's Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is native to the Himalayan region and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, primarily due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and anti-diarrheal effects. The health benefits of Tabernaemontana wallichiana include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, diarrhea, and skin infections, as well as its potential role in reducing inflammation and improving digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves or roots in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
